response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally skilled engineer with 16+ years of experience and strong leadership credentials, but he lacks the critical foundational requirements for this embedded networking security role. He has no demonstrated expertise in C/UNIX (required), no Japanese language proficiency (required as native-level), no Linux kernel modification experience (required), and no background in networking security, embedded firmware, or switch products. His career is rooted in web/backend development with modern languages like TypeScript and Node.js—fundamentally misaligned with embedded firmware development. While his problem-solving ability is evident, the domain-specific gaps and language requirement make him unsuitable without extensive retraining.
strengths: Senior-level software engineer with 16+ years experience across web, mobile, desktop and some embedded systems, demonstrating strong technical depth and adaptability across domains
Leadership and mentorship background (Staff roles at Google/Meta, organized workshops), indicating ability to navigate complex technical challenges and communicate effectively
DevOps and infrastructure expertise (GitLab, CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes) showing capability to work with complex system integration and tooling
concerns: No demonstrated C/UNIX proficiency—career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and high-level languages; only 2014-2015 experience with C++ and no evidence of modern embedded C development
No Japanese language proficiency listed (English, Romanian, German only)—role requires native-level Japanese, a non-negotiable requirement
No security-focused experience—no evidence of work with MACsec, 802.1X, encryption systems, device attack detection, or any embedded security technologies required by role

key_factors.factor: No Japanese language proficiency (required at native level)
Domain mismatch—web/backend focus vs. embedded networking security
